name: Dredd
description: Language-agnostic HTTP API testing tool that validates an API implementation against its OpenAPI or API Blueprint documentation.

seo.title: Dredd — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Dredd: Language-agnostic HTTP API testing tool that validates an API implementation against its OpenAPI or API Blueprint documentation.

when_to_use: Validate REST API against OpenAPI spec in CI
Catch API contract drift before it reaches production
Language-agnostic HTTP testing from API Blueprint docs
Prevent breaking changes in public API releases

pros: Validates real API against OpenAPI or API Blueprint
Supports hooks for auth and fixtures
cons: Maintenance has slowed markedly in recent years
Hooks in many languages feel bolted on
review.verdict: Useful as a contract-testing safety net, but feels like aging software in an OpenAPI-3 world.
review.best_for: Teams with solid OpenAPI specs who want a CI guardrail against drift
review.not_for: Teams that need rich contract testing, consumer-driven pacts or modern tooling
